YOU'RE GONNA CARRY THAT WEIGHT

I'm Apurva from Houston, TX. I studied Information Science at the University of Michigan. I'm a Cloud Engineer at Amazon Web Services, where I work on enterprise VPC architecture, WAF, Route 53, and network infrastructure.

I love building things. Lately that means cloud infrastructure tooling, ML models, and multi-agent systems. I read too much about wine and watch too much F1. Michigan football runs through my blood.

When I'm not in front of a terminal, I'm on the slopes, on the course, or finding something new to add to Beli.

Website

Built with Astro. Hosted on AWS (S3 + CloudFront). Source on GitHub. Typeset in Fraunces, Source Sans 3 & Crimson Pro.

Crafted by Apurva for -0.03 years
